design_philosophy.core_concept: The Void Arena - minimalist geometry with high-contrast neon accents

typography.import_instructions: Import 'Rajdhani' (weights 500, 600, 700) and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css

background_texture.usage: Use as a fixed background for the page body with opacity-20 and grayscale blending to add subtle depth without distraction.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: overlay linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2))

layout_structure.grid: grid h-screen place-items-center bg-background overflow-hidden relative

GameWrapper.description: Main container that centers the canvas and manages the aspect ratio.
GameWrapper.styles: relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border border-white/5 ring-1 ring-white/10

Canvas.description: Pure HTML5 Canvas element managed by React useRef. Handles game loop.

HUD.description: Heads-up display for score and basic info.
HUD.styles: absolute top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-8 px-6 py-2 rounded-full bg-black/50 backdrop-blur border border-white/10

VictoryModal.description: Overlay shown when score reaches 15 or game over.
VictoryModal.styles: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for UI icons (RefreshCcw, Trophy, MousePointer2).
Use 'react-use' or custom hooks for window resize handling to keep canvas responsive.
Game Logic: Keep the game loop separated in a class or hook (e.g., useGameLoop) to keep the component clean.
Canvas Rendering: Use requestAnimationFrame. Avoid React state updates inside the game loop for rendering; render directly to canvas context.

River Logic: The river is a no-go zone or just a visual separator? Problem says 'split by horizontal river', usually in Pudge Wars hook can cross river but players cannot walk on it. Implement collision for players/river.
Controls: Right click to move (prevent context menu), Q to hook (towards mouse position).
Win Condition: First to 15 points. Show VictoryModal with 'Restart' button.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
